name: AI-Agents-Safe-Coding-Skills
description: Plugin-safe Codex plugin for the AI-Agents-Safe-Coding-Skills library.

interface.shortDescription: 1,248 plugin-safe skills for coding, security, product, and ops workflows.
interface.longDescription: Install a plugin-safe Codex distribution of AI-Agents-Safe-Coding-Skills. Skills that still need hardening or target-specific setup remain available in the repo but are excluded from this plugin.
defaultPrompt: Use @brainstorming to plan a new feature.
Use @test-driven-development to fix a bug safely.
